title: nOS Ansible Event
description: Structured event emitted by the wing_telemetry callback plugin. One event per lifecycle signal during an Ansible playbook run. Consumed by BoxAPI /api/v1/events (HMAC-authenticated) and mirrored into the Wing events table.

ts.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp with Z suffix.

source.description: Attribution hint for this event's writer (Anatomy P1, 2026-05-05). Free-text channel label; canonical values: 'callback' (Ansible callback plugin), 'operator' (manual curl/API hit), 'agent:<name>' (A8 conductor + future agent runs). Complements A10 actor_id.

actor_id.description: Authentik client_id of the writer (operator / agent / plugin). A10 cryptographic actor audit (2026-05-08). Required for non-callback writes after A10 finalises; pre-A10 callback events leave NULL.

actor_action_id.description: UUID grouping events that belong to one logical action (e.g. agent_run_start + agent_run_end of one conductor pulse run share an actor_action_id, joined to pulse_runs.actor_action_id).

acted_at.description: ISO-8601 wall-clock time the action was initiated. Usually = ts; kept separate so backfilled events can record the original action time vs row insert time.
